features.name: little_endian_vector_declaration_with_part_select
features.description: Code should include a vector declaration with little-endian indexing [0:N-1] instead of standard [N-1:0], combined with part select operations via indexed variables

features.name: multiple_always_blocks_same_register_part_select
features.description: Code should include multiple separate always @(posedge clk) blocks operating on different part-select ranges of the same register
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (rst) begin
    for (i0=0; i0<=15; i0=i0+1) lego0_q[i0] <= 0;
  end
end
always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (rst) begin
    for (i3=48; i3<=63; i3=i3+1) lego0_q[i3] <= 0;
  end
end

features.name: part_select_reset_to_constant_vs_pass_through
features.description: Code should include a register with part selects where reset assigns constant 0, and normal mode passes through an input signal
